_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: we collected and analyzed 95 samples from 90 fresh-frozen tumors (61 NF1-related; 29 sporadic) and matched blood samples from 77 individuals using whole-genome sequencing
details: Successfully aligned whole-genome sequencing reads for 95 tumor samples and matched blood samples from 77 individuals
